name: iCIMS Talent Cloud API
what_it_does: iCIMS REST API for enterprise talent acquisition platform. Enables AI agents to query job postings, retrieve candidate profiles, access offer management data, manage onboarding workflows, and integrate talent data into HR and HRIS systems. iCIMS is one of the largest enterprise ATS platforms used by Fortune 500 companies.
use_cases: Querying job requisition status and candidate pipeline from talent analytics agents
Retrieving candidate application and interview data from HR workflow agents
Accessing offer letter and onboarding task status from HR automation agents
Integrating iCIMS talent data into HRIS and workforce planning agents
not_for: Small business hiring without enterprise ATS needs
best_when: A large enterprise using iCIMS Talent Cloud wants AI agents to surface pipeline metrics, manage candidate workflows, and integrate recruiting data into HRIS and reporting systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Candidate data including applications, assessments, and offer details is highly sensitive. EEOC compliance required for any automated screening actions.

auth.notes: iCIMS OAuth 2.0 with client credentials for service-to-service integration. Developer portal for app registration. Enterprise SSO integration available.

pricing.notes: Enterprise ATS platform for large companies. API access included with iCIMS subscription.

performance.rate_limits: iCIMS API: rate limits per application; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Candidate PII and hiring data is highly sensitive — EEOC compliance required
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API integration required
iCIMS has complex object model — understand Person, Job, Application objects
API access requires iCIMS partner/developer agreement
Healthcare customers may have HIPAA-required data handling for health-related screening
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Enterprise candidate data including applications, assessments, and offer details. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2 enterprise auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise candidate PII and hiring data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. EEOC compliance for screening.
